focus_points.label: Celebrating the payments refactor win
focus_points.reason: Just shipped the payments refactor — big win, team noticed. Worth acknowledging their contribution and impact.

focus_points.label: Checking in on motivation and mood
focus_points.reason: Looks a bit flat this week, quieter than usual in standup. Could be a temporary dip, worth exploring how they're feeling.

focus_points.label: Interest in mentoring opportunities
focus_points.reason: Mentioned they'd like to do more mentoring. Could be a chance to discuss how that fits into their current role and future.

focus_points.label: Upcoming billing rewrite involvement
focus_points.reason: Next quarter they'll probably be pulled into the billing rewrite. Worth clarifying what that entails and their thoughts on it.

focus_points.label: Any blockers on current projects?
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard check-in topic. Good to ensure they’re not facing any obstacles after the recent refactor.
